hero_subtitle: Learn the sensual and passionate dance from Angola
about_description: Kizomba is an Angolan partner dance that emerged in the late 1980s. It blends traditional Angolan rhythms with Brazilian and Caribbean influences, creating a slow, sensual, and deeply musical dance form.

features.text: Small group classes for personalized attention

classes_list.title: Beginners
classes_list.description: New to kizomba? Learn the fundamentals of connection, basic steps, and rhythm. Perfect for dancers of any background.

classes_list.title: Intermediate
classes_list.description: Build on your foundations with more complex movements, styling, and partnering techniques. Grow your musicality.

classes_list.title: Advanced
classes_list.description: Master intricate techniques, advanced styling, and leading/following. For experienced dancers seeking to refine their craft.

classes_list.title: Social Nights
classes_list.description: Practice what you've learned in a relaxed, social atmosphere. Dance, connect, and enjoy the community.
